verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus my help I call on Your name I cast my cares on You Jesus my hope My tower of strength My faith has found in You I see You pierced Wounded for me When I look to the cross I see

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I see grace Sealed by your sacrifice I see love Reaching for me Precious blood Washes and sanctifies Healing flows Setting me free I see grace

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Bearer of sin Afflicted and tried You paid redemption's price Bearing my curse You set me on high Your death has brought me life

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I see You pierced Wounded for me When I look to the cross I see

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I see grace Sealed by Your sacrifice I see love Reaching for me Precious blood Washes and sanctifies Healing flows Setting me free I see grace
